company.segment_en: Custom AI accelerators (XPU) + merchant AI networking + VMware software — the merchant enabler of custom silicon, and a top TSMC customer
company.segment_zh: 客製 AI 加速器（XPU）＋商用 AI 網路＋VMware 軟體 — 客製矽的軍火商，也是台積電前段大客戶
company.blurb_en: How Broadcom raises the realized price of compute (custom-ASIC value capture · networking content per cluster · VMware repricing), what to watch it with, how much it makes from AI, and how — whether the market buys GPUs or ASICs — it all lands on TSMC N3 + CoWoS.
company.blurb_zh: Broadcom 怎麼提高已實現算力售價（客製 ASIC 價值捕獲 · 每叢集網路含量 · VMware 再定價）、能用什麼資料觀察、從 AI 賺多少，以及無論市場買 GPU 還是 ASIC，這一切如何全落在台積電 N3＋CoWoS。

thesis_en: Broadcom is the arms dealer of the anti-NVIDIA trade. It co-designs the custom AI accelerators (XPUs) that let Google, Meta and others cut their GPU bill, it owns the merchant networking silicon every AI cluster needs to scale, and VMware's repriced software funds the R&D. Realized price rises through custom-ASIC value capture, rising networking content per cluster, and software repricing — not list-price hikes. And whether the market buys NVIDIA GPUs or hyperscaler ASICs, the silicon is fabbed by TSMC: so Broadcom is TSMC's hedge, routing hyperscaler diversification straight back to TSMC's leading edge and CoWoS.
thesis_zh: Broadcom 是「反 NVIDIA」交易的軍火商。它與客戶共同設計客製 AI 加速器（XPU），讓 Google、Meta 等砍掉 GPU 帳單；它掌握每個 AI 叢集擴張都需要的商用網路矽；而再定價後的 VMware 軟體替研發買單。已實現價格靠客製 ASIC 價值捕獲、每叢集網路含量上升、軟體再定價推升 — 而非抬牌價。無論市場買 NVIDIA GPU 還是巨頭的 ASIC，矽都由台積電製造：因此 Broadcom 是台積電的避險，把巨頭的去 NVIDIA 化需求直接導回台積電的先進製程與 CoWoS。

headline.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

pricing.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

levers.name_zh: 客製 AI 加速器（XPU）價值捕獲
levers.mechanism_en: Broadcom co-designs hyperscaler accelerators (Google TPU, Meta MTIA and others), capturing the high-value IP — SerDes, advanced packaging, design services and a share of each XPU shipped. As hyperscalers shift spend from merchant GPUs to custom silicon, Broadcom captures rising dollar content per accelerator deployed.
levers.mechanism_zh: Broadcom 與巨頭共同設計加速器（Google TPU、Meta MTIA 等），捕獲高價值 IP — SerDes、先進封裝、設計服務與每顆 XPU 的分潤。當巨頭把支出從商用 GPU 移向客製矽，Broadcom 捕獲每部署一顆加速器越來越高的金額含量。
levers.observability_en: Broadcom AI revenue guidance, custom-silicon customer count & 2027 SAM commentary, hyperscaler TPU/MTIA disclosures.
levers.observability_zh: Broadcom AI 營收指引、客製矽客戶數與 2027 SAM 評論、巨頭 TPU/MTIA 揭露。
levers.source_en: Broadcom earnings calls; hyperscaler accelerator announcements
levers.source_zh: Broadcom 法說會；巨頭加速器公告

levers.name_en: Rising networking content per AI cluster (Tomahawk / Jericho / optics)
levers.name_zh: 每 AI 叢集網路含量上升（Tomahawk／Jericho／光通訊）
levers.mechanism_en: As clusters scale to 100k+ accelerators, scale-out Ethernet (Tomahawk switches), scheduled fabric (Jericho), retimers, PCIe switches and optical DSP all rise in dollar content per accelerator. Broadcom is the merchant leader, so networking $ per cluster grows independent of any list-price move.
levers.mechanism_zh: 當叢集擴張到 10 萬顆以上加速器，scale-out 乙太網路（Tomahawk 交換器）、排程 fabric（Jericho）、retimer、PCIe 交換器與光 DSP，每顆加速器的金額含量全面上升。Broadcom 是商用領導者，因此每叢集網路金額成長與牌價無關。
levers.observability_en: Networking revenue line, 800G→1.6T switch & optics ramp (Dell'Oro/LightCounting), Ethernet vs NVLink share.
levers.observability_zh: 網路營收項、800G→1.6T 交換器與光通訊放量（Dell'Oro／LightCounting）、乙太網路 vs NVLink 占比。
levers.source_en: Broadcom 10-Q networking disclosures; switch/optics market trackers
levers.source_zh: Broadcom 10-Q 網路揭露；交換器／光通訊市場追蹤

levers.name_zh: VMware 軟體再定價（訂閱＋VCF 綁定）
levers.mechanism_en: Post-acquisition, Broadcom converted VMware to subscription and bundled SKUs (VMware Cloud Foundation), sharply raising realized price per customer at very high margin. This recurring software engine funds AI R&D and lifts blended company-level realized price.
levers.mechanism_zh: 併購後，Broadcom 把 VMware 轉為訂閱與綁定 SKU（VMware Cloud Foundation），以極高毛利大幅提高每客戶已實現售價。這部週期性軟體引擎替 AI 研發買單，並拉高公司層級的混合已實現售價。
levers.observability_en: Infrastructure Software segment revenue & operating margin, VMware ARR / subscription mix, renewal pricing reports.
levers.observability_zh: 基礎設施軟體分部營收與營益率、VMware ARR／訂閱比重、續約定價報導。
levers.source_zh: Broadcom 10-Q 基礎設施軟體分部

levers.mechanism_en: Best-in-class SerDes and packaging IP give Broadcom sole-source positions inside custom designs and a pricing premium competitors (Marvell, Alchip) struggle to match — the technical moat under the custom-ASIC lever.
levers.mechanism_zh: 頂尖的 SerDes 與封裝 IP 讓 Broadcom 在客製設計中取得獨家供應地位與定價溢價，競爭者（Marvell、創意/Alchip）難以匹敵 — 這是客製 ASIC 槓桿底下的技術護城河。
levers.observability_en: Design-win retention across generations, SerDes speed leadership (200G/lane), competitive teardowns.
levers.observability_zh: 跨世代的設計勝出保持、SerDes 速度領先（200G/lane）、競品拆解。

levers.mechanism_en: Custom-silicon programs are multi-year and deeply co-engineered; once designed in, Broadcom holds the socket across successive generations, stabilizing realized price and shielding it from re-bid pressure.
levers.mechanism_zh: 客製矽專案是多年期且深度共同工程；一旦設計導入，Broadcom 跨連續世代守住該插槽，穩住已實現價格並抵禦重新競標壓力。
levers.observability_en: Customer concentration & program continuity in filings, multi-generation roadmap commentary.
levers.observability_zh: 財報中的客戶集中度與專案延續性、多世代路線圖評論。
levers.source_zh: Broadcom 10-K 風險因素與客戶評論

levers.name_zh: 共封裝光學與次世代含量擴張
levers.mechanism_en: Co-packaged optics, optical DSP and next-gen PCIe/scale-up fabrics add incremental high-value silicon per cluster, expanding Broadcom's served content as interconnect bandwidth becomes the binding constraint.
levers.mechanism_zh: 共封裝光學、光 DSP 與次世代 PCIe／scale-up fabric，為每叢集增添高價值矽含量；當互連頻寬成為綁定約束，Broadcom 的可服務含量隨之擴張。
levers.observability_en: CPO product roadmap, optical attach rate, interconnect bandwidth roadmaps.
levers.observability_zh: CPO 產品路線圖、光學 attach 率、互連頻寬路線圖。
levers.source_en: Broadcom product roadmap; optical market research
levers.source_zh: Broadcom 產品路線圖；光通訊市場研究

pricing.engine_note_en: custom-ASIC value capture, rising networking content per cluster and VMware software repricing are doing the work — Broadcom monetizes the shift away from merchant GPUs
pricing.engine_note_zh: 客製 ASIC 價值捕獲、每叢集網路含量上升與 VMware 軟體再定價在推動 — Broadcom 把「去 NVIDIA 化」變現

items.name_zh: Broadcom 10-Q／10-K（半導體 vs 基礎設施軟體）
items.what_en: Segment revenue & operating margin, networking line, RPO/backlog, AI commentary — the hard floor under the benefit estimate.
items.what_zh: 分部營收與營益率、網路項、RPO/在手訂單、AI 評論 — 利益估計的硬底。

items.name_zh: Broadcom 法說會與投資人資料
items.what_en: Guided AI semiconductor revenue, custom-silicon customer count & multi-year SAM, networking and VMware framing.
items.what_zh: 指引的 AI 半導體營收、客製矽客戶數與多年期 SAM、網路與 VMware 措辭。

items.what_en: The custom-silicon demand that leads Broadcom AI revenue — and the budget that funds TPU/MTIA programs.
items.what_zh: 領先 Broadcom AI 營收的客製矽需求 — 也是替 TPU/MTIA 專案買單的預算。

items.name_zh: SemiAnalysis 客製矽與網路模型
items.what_en: Independent XPU shipment/ASP and switch-share estimates — the cross-check on Broadcom's AI content and design wins.
items.what_zh: 獨立的 XPU 出貨/ASP 與交換器占比估計 — 對 Broadcom AI 含量與設計勝出的交叉驗證。

items.name_zh: 台積電營收與 CoWoS 產能揭露
items.what_en: Leading-edge (N3/N5) mix and CoWoS capacity — the supply ceiling Broadcom's XPUs share with NVIDIA.
items.what_zh: 先進製程（N3/N5）結構與 CoWoS 產能 — Broadcom XPU 與 NVIDIA 共用的供給天花板。

items.name_zh: 乙太網路交換器與光通訊追蹤（Dell'Oro／LightCounting）
items.what_en: 800G→1.6T switch and optical shipment data — a direct proxy for Broadcom's networking-content lever.
items.what_zh: 800G→1.6T 交換器與光學出貨數據 — Broadcom 網路含量槓桿的直接 proxy。

items.name_zh: VMware／基礎設施軟體 ARR 與定價
items.what_en: Subscription mix, VCF bundle pricing and renewal/churn signals — where the software-repricing lever shows up.
items.what_zh: 訂閱比重、VCF 綁定定價與續約/流失訊號 — 軟體再定價槓桿的觀測點。

items.name_zh: HBM 供給（SK 海力士／美光／三星）
items.what_en: HBM capacity & qualification — the memory input for HBM-class XPUs, alongside CoWoS.
items.what_zh: HBM 產能與驗證 — 搭配 CoWoS、供 HBM 級 XPU 的記憶體輸入。

estimates.method_zh: AI 半導體營收年化（指引值，年化）
estimates.basis_en: Broadcom guides AI semiconductor revenue explicitly each quarter (custom XPUs + AI networking). Annualizing the recent guided quarter gives a ~$38B run-rate; management's stated 2027 SAM for its lead custom-silicon customers is $60–90B. Annualization/forward-mix is the only projection. See /payback for the demand-side coverage view.
estimates.basis_zh: Broadcom 每季明確指引 AI 半導體營收（客製 XPU＋AI 網路）。把近一季指引值年化得約 $38B 年化；管理層所述其領先客製矽客戶的 2027 SAM 為 $60–90B。唯一推估是年化／前瞻組合。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback。

estimates.method_en: AI networking portion of AI semi revenue
estimates.method_zh: AI 網路占 AI 半導體營收部分
estimates.basis_en: Roughly a third of AI semi revenue is networking silicon (switches, fabric, optics, retimers) — distinct from the custom-XPU compute portion. The split is estimated; Broadcom discloses the AI total, not always the compute/networking mix.
estimates.basis_zh: AI 半導體營收約三分之一為網路矽（交換器、fabric、光通訊、retimer）— 有別於客製 XPU 運算部分。此拆分為估計；Broadcom 揭露 AI 總額，未必揭露運算/網路組合。

estimates.method_zh: 基礎設施軟體（VMware）營益（買單視角）
estimates.basis_en: The repriced Infrastructure Software segment runs at very high margin and annualizes a large operating income — not AI revenue itself, but the recurring engine that funds Broadcom's AI R&D and design-services scale. A derived estimate from segment margin.
estimates.basis_zh: 再定價後的基礎設施軟體分部以極高毛利運行、年化出龐大營益 — 它本身非 AI 營收，而是替 Broadcom AI 研發與設計服務規模買單的週期性引擎。為分部利潤率推導之估計。

benefit.disclosure_note_en: Broadcom guides AI semiconductor revenue directly (and a multi-year custom-silicon SAM); the compute-vs-networking split and the software-funding lens are the estimates.
benefit.disclosure_note_zh: Broadcom 直接指引 AI 半導體營收（及多年期客製矽 SAM）；運算 vs 網路的拆分與軟體買單視角才是估計。

chain.accelerator_en: Custom AI XPU (Google TPU / Meta MTIA-class)
chain.accelerator_zh: 客製 AI XPU（Google TPU／Meta MTIA 級）
chain.note_en: The signature program — large-die CoWoS + HBM makes it as TSMC-bound as any NVIDIA GPU; this is how hyperscaler diversification still lands at TSMC.
chain.note_zh: 招牌專案 — 大尺寸 CoWoS＋HBM 使其與任何 NVIDIA GPU 一樣綁死台積電；這正是巨頭多元化仍落回台積電的路徑。

chain.accelerator_zh: 次世代 XPU（2nm 路線圖）
chain.role_zh: 前瞻客製加速器路線圖
chain.note_en: Pushes Broadcom and its customers onto TSMC's most advanced node and next-gen CoWoS/HBM4 — deepening leading-edge dependence.
chain.note_zh: 把 Broadcom 與其客戶推上台積電最先進節點與次世代 CoWoS/HBM4 — 加深對先進製程的依賴。

chain.note_en: The merchant Ethernet engine for AI clusters — TSMC-fabbed, and the core of the networking-content lever.
chain.note_zh: AI 叢集的商用乙太網路引擎 — 由台積電製造，也是網路含量槓桿的核心。

chain.note_en: Connects large training clusters with lossless scheduling — another TSMC leading-edge die per cluster.
chain.note_zh: 以無損排程連接大型訓練叢集 — 每叢集另一顆台積電先進製程晶粒。

chain.role_zh: 高速互連 IP 與元件
chain.note_en: The interconnect glue that scales clusters — best-in-class SerDes is the IP moat under the custom-ASIC wins.
chain.note_zh: 讓叢集擴張的互連黏著 — 頂尖 SerDes 是客製 ASIC 勝出底下的 IP 護城河。

chain.note_en: As bandwidth becomes the binding constraint, optical content rises — again on TSMC silicon.
chain.note_zh: 當頻寬成為綁定約束，光學含量上升 — 同樣跑在台積電矽上。

silicon.tsmc_read_en: Essentially 100% of Broadcom's AI silicon — the custom XPUs, the Tomahawk/Jericho networking and the SerDes/optics — is fabbed by TSMC on N3-N5 and, for the big accelerators, packaged with CoWoS. For TSMC, Broadcom is the hedge against NVIDIA concentration: it is the second large pillar of CoWoS demand and the vector through which hyperscaler diversification AWAY from NVIDIA flows straight back to TSMC's leading edge. Broadcom and NVIDIA compete for the SAME N3 + CoWoS allocation — so whichever way the GPU-vs-ASIC battle goes, TSMC wins the wafer, and the binding constraint stays the CoWoS bottleneck TSMC controls.
silicon.tsmc_read_zh: Broadcom 的 AI 矽 — 客製 XPU、Tomahawk/Jericho 網路與 SerDes/光通訊 — 幾乎 100% 由台積電以 N3-N5 製造，大型加速器並用 CoWoS 封裝。對台積電而言，Broadcom 是對抗 NVIDIA 集中度的避險：它是 CoWoS 需求的第二根大支柱，也是巨頭「去 NVIDIA 化」需求直接流回台積電先進製程的渠道。Broadcom 與 NVIDIA 競逐同一批 N3＋CoWoS 配額 — 因此無論 GPU vs ASIC 之戰怎麼走，台積電都贏得晶圓，綁定約束仍是台積電掌握的 CoWoS 瓶頸。

proxies.name_zh: 台積電（TSM）— 供給端 proxy

alerts.en: Realized-price engine running hot: pricing-power score 73.8/100 — custom-ASIC value capture, rising networking content per cluster and VMware software repricing are doing the work — Broadcom monetizes the shift away from merchant GPUs.
alerts.zh: 已實現價格引擎火熱：定價權分數 73.8/100 — 客製 ASIC 價值捕獲、每叢集網路含量上升與 VMware 軟體再定價在推動 — Broadcom 把「去 NVIDIA 化」變現。

alerts.en: GPU-scarcity proxy cooling: NVDA -11.83%/m — watch the accelerator-scarcity premium (capacity-block pricing) for follow-through.
alerts.zh: GPU 稀缺 proxy 降溫：NVDA -11.83%/月 — 留意加速器稀缺溢價（capacity-block 定價）是否跟跌。

alerts.en: Concentration: ~100% of the AI compute behind this benefit is TSMC-fabbed, 2 link(s) critical — the CoWoS bottleneck TSMC controls is the binding constraint on growth.
alerts.zh: 集中度：撐起此利益的 AI 算力約 100% 由台積電製造，2 條鏈關鍵 — 台積電掌握的 CoWoS 瓶頸即成長綁定約束。

alerts.en: AI benefit (headline) ≈ $38.0B revenue_runrate — Broadcom guides AI semiconductor revenue directly (and a multi-year custom-silicon SAM); the compute-vs-networking split and the software-funding lens are the estimates.
alerts.zh: AI 利益（頭條）≈ $38.0B revenue_runrate — Broadcom 直接指引 AI 半導體營收（及多年期客製矽 SAM）；運算 vs 網路的拆分與軟體買單視角才是估計。

integrated_thesis.en: Broadcom's realized-price engine (score 73.8, RAISING) runs on custom-ASIC value capture: it co-designs hyperscaler XPUs (Google TPU, Meta MTIA-class) and captures margin on silicon that would otherwise be merchant GPU spend, layered with rising networking content per cluster (Tomahawk/Jericho/optics) and VMware subscription repricing. AI semi revenue is guided at a ~$38B run-rate. Every accelerator and switch in this story is TSMC-fabbed on N3→N2 with CoWoS and HBM — ~100% dependency, two critical links. Broadcom is simultaneously a direct leading-edge/CoWoS customer and the primary vehicle monetizing the shift away from merchant GPUs. For TSMC, more Broadcom XPUs means more N3/N2 wafers and CoWoS allocation.
integrated_thesis.zh: 博通的實現價格引擎(評分73.8,上升)靠客製ASIC價值捕獲:與超大規模業者共同設計XPU(Google TPU、Meta MTIA級),在原屬商用GPU支出的矽片上捕獲利潤,再疊加每叢集持續上升的網路含量(Tomahawk/Jericho/光學)與VMware訂閱重新定價。AI半導體營收指引年化約380億美元。這故事裡的每顆加速器與交換器皆由台積電N3→N2製造,搭配CoWoS與HBM——依賴度近100%,兩條關鍵鏈路。博通既是直接的先進製程/CoWoS客戶,也是變現「遠離商用GPU」轉向的主載體。對台積電而言,博通XPU愈多,即N3/N2晶圓與CoWoS配置需求愈大。

pricing.en: Score 73.8, RAISING. The top lever is custom-ASIC value capture (strength 82) — Broadcom prices the IP, SerDes and integration, not a commodity die, so realized value per unit stays high even as list-price-per-flop falls. Networking content per cluster (80) and VMware repricing (78) are the two co-equal T1 levers doing the rest. List prices fall; realized price rises through mix-shift up the stack, multi-year design-win lock-in and IP premium.
pricing.zh: 評分73.8,上升。首要槓桿為客製ASIC價值捕獲(強度82)——博通定價的是IP、SerDes與整合而非商品化晶粒,故單位實現價值維持高檔,即使每flop牌價下滑。每叢集網路含量(80)與VMware重新定價(78)是並列的兩大T1槓桿。牌價下滑,實現價格靠向上游組合轉移、多年設計贏單鎖定與IP溢價而上升。

sources.en: Highest-signal: Broadcom 10-Q/K Semiconductor-vs-Infrastructure-Software split and earnings-call AI-semi guidance (the one directly disclosed number). Triangulate with hyperscaler capex (GOOG/META), SemiAnalysis custom-silicon models, Dell'Oro/LightCounting for switch & optics share, VMware ARR, and — critically — TSMC revenue & CoWoS capacity plus HBM supply (SK hynix/Micron) to confirm the silicon actually ships.
sources.zh: 最高訊號:博通10-Q/K的半導體與基礎架構軟體分部拆分,及財報電話會的AI半導體指引(唯一直接揭露的數字)。再以超大規模業者資本支出(GOOG/META)、SemiAnalysis客製矽模型、Dell'Oro/LightCounting交換器與光學份額、VMware ARR交叉驗證;並關鍵性參照台積電營收與CoWoS產能及HBM供給(SK海力士/美光),確認矽片確實出貨。

benefit.en: Headline is a guided ~$38B AI-semiconductor revenue run-rate — high confidence because Broadcom guides this directly (rare candor). Beneath it are estimates, not reported facts: ~$12B networking portion (medium) and a separate VMware ~$18B operating-income funding lens (medium). Treat the compute-vs-networking split as modeled. The multi-year custom-silicon SAM Broadcom cites is a forward claim, not a booked figure.
benefit.zh: 標題為指引的AI半導體營收年化約380億美元——高信心度,因博通直接指引(罕見坦率)。其下屬估算而非揭露事實:網路約120億(中信心)及另計的VMware約180億營業利益資金視角(中信心)。運算與網路的拆分應視為模型推估。博通引用的多年客製矽SAM為前瞻主張,非已入帳數字。

silicon.en: ~100% TSMC-fabbed, two critical links: current custom XPUs on N3 with CoWoS+HBM, next-gen XPUs on the N2 roadmap with advanced CoWoS+HBM4. Tomahawk 5/6 and Jericho3-AI add high-dependency N5/N4/N3 volume; SerDes/retimers and co-packaged optics add medium exposure. Broadcom is one of the largest concentrators of TSMC leading-edge and CoWoS demand outside NVIDIA.
silicon.zh: 近100%由台積電製造,兩條關鍵鏈路:現行客製XPU用N3搭CoWoS+HBM,次世代XPU走N2路線圖搭先進CoWoS+HBM4。Tomahawk 5/6與Jericho3-AI增添高依賴的N5/N4/N3量;SerDes/重定時器與共封裝光學為中度曝險。博通是NVIDIA之外最大的台積電先進製程與CoWoS需求集中者之一。

tsmc_implication.en: Both a direct advanced-node customer AND the counterweight to NVIDIA — but for TSMC the money lands the same way: N3/N2 wafers plus CoWoS. The binding constraint is CoWoS allocation, where Broadcom XPUs and NVIDIA GPUs compete for the same capacity TSMC controls. Broadcom can win designs it cannot ship if CoWoS is tight, so TSMC's capacity decisions directly gate Broadcom's $38B ramp. Net: whether the hyperscaler compute dollar flows to a merchant GPU or a custom XPU, it converts to TSMC leading-edge and CoWoS demand — capacity planning, not demand, is the risk.
tsmc_implication.zh: 博通既是直接的先進製程客戶,也是NVIDIA的制衡者——但對台積電而言收益路徑相同:N3/N2晶圓加CoWoS。約束在CoWoS配置,博通XPU與NVIDIA GPU爭奪台積電掌控的同一產能。若CoWoS吃緊,博通可贏設計卻無法出貨,故台積電產能決策直接控制博通380億美元的爬坡。淨結論:無論超大規模業者的運算支出流向商用GPU或客製XPU,皆轉化為台積電先進製程與CoWoS需求——風險在產能規劃而非需求。

scenarios.trigger_en: XPU customers ramp from ~3 toward 5+, AI semi run-rate clears $50B, and 1.6T transition lifts networking content per cluster.
scenarios.trigger_zh: XPU客戶從約3家增至5家以上,AI半導體年化營收突破500億美元,1.6T轉進推升每叢集網路含量。

scenarios.trigger_en: Broadcom and NVIDIA compete for the same TSMC CoWoS allocation; XPU shipments capped below design-win backlog despite $38B guide.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 博通與NVIDIA爭奪同一台積電CoWoS配置;儘管380億指引,XPU出貨受限於設計贏單積壓之下。

scenarios.name_en: AI digestion / GPU reasserts vs ASIC
scenarios.trigger_en: Hyperscaler capex digests, an XPU program slips or is insourced, and NVIDIA GPUs + Spectrum-X Ethernet regain share; AI run-rate stalls near $38B.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 超大規模業者資本支出進入消化期,某XPU專案延遲或內製,NVIDIA GPU與Spectrum-X乙太網奪回份額;AI年化營收停滯於380億附近。

scenarios.trigger_en: VMware ARR and VCF bundle pricing step up while AI content per cluster rises, lifting blended realized price and margin even as unit growth moderates.
scenarios.trigger_zh: VMware ARR與VCF綑綁定價上調,AI每叢集含量上升,即使單位成長放緩仍推升綜合實現價格與利潤。

falsification.en: A major hyperscaler cancels or insources an XPU program (moving to internal or alternative-foundry design), collapsing the custom-ASIC value-capture lever.
falsification.zh: 某大型超大規模業者取消或內製XPU專案(轉向自研或替代晶圓廠設計),使客製ASIC價值捕獲槓桿崩解。

falsification.en: AI semi run-rate is revised below ~$30B on subsequent guidance, breaking the $38B benefit headline and the flywheel thesis.
falsification.zh: 後續指引將AI半導體年化營收下修至約300億美元以下,打破380億美元效益標題與飛輪論點。

falsification.en: Merchant Ethernet (Spectrum-X) and GPUs recapture networking + compute share, reversing the rising-content-per-cluster lever.
falsification.zh: 商用乙太網(Spectrum-X)與GPU奪回網路與運算份額,逆轉每叢集含量上升槓桿。

watch.en: Broadcom AI-semi run-rate guidance & XPU customer count on quarterly calls
watch.zh: 博通季度電話會的AI半導體年化營收指引與XPU客戶數

watch.en: NVDA GPU-scarcity proxy for capacity-block premium follow-through (currently -11.83%/m)
watch.zh: NVDA GPU稀缺性代理,觀察產能塊定價溢價延續性(目前月-11.83%)

watch.en: TSMC CoWoS capacity disclosures and allocation commentary (binding constraint)
watch.zh: 台積電CoWoS產能揭露與配置評論(約束瓶頸)

watch.en: Hyperscaler capex trajectory (GOOG/META) — demand signal for XPU ramp
watch.zh: 超大規模業者資本支出軌跡(GOOG/META)——XPU爬坡需求訊號

watch.en: Ethernet switch & optics share (Dell'Oro / LightCounting), 1.6T transition
watch.zh: 乙太網交換器與光學份額(Dell'Oro/LightCounting),1.6T轉進

watch.en: HBM supply from SK hynix / Micron / Samsung — co-constraint on XPU shipments
watch.zh: SK海力士/美光/三星的HBM供給——XPU出貨的共同約束

watch.en: VMware / Infrastructure Software ARR and VCF bundle pricing steps
watch.zh: VMware/基礎架構軟體ARR與VCF綑綁定價調整

cross_links.label_en: CapEx → Wafer Engine — turn the custom-silicon capex Broadcom captures into implied TSMC wafer demand
cross_links.label_zh: CapEx → 晶圓引擎 — 把 Broadcom 吃下的客製矽 capex 換算成隱含台積電晶圓需求

cross_links.label_en: Pricing Power Radar — the foundry ASP side of the same price stack
cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 同一價格堆疊的代工 ASP 端

cross_links.label_en: Capex Payback Radar — is the hyperscaler AI capex Broadcom feeds on paying off yet?
cross_links.label_zh: 資本支出回本雷達 — 餵養 Broadcom 的巨頭 AI capex 回本了沒？

cross_links.label_en: AI Compute Demand Radar — the custom-accelerator demand Broadcom supplies
cross_links.label_zh: AI 算力需求雷達 — Broadcom 供給的客製加速器需求

cross_links.label_en: Rival Radar — TSMC's competitive position behind Broadcom's silicon
cross_links.label_zh: 競爭者雷達 — Broadcom 矽背後台積電的競爭格局

blind_spots_en: Some custom-XPU customer identities (e.g. which hyperscaler) are press/industry-attributed, not confirmed by Broadcom.
AI revenue is management-defined and guided; the compute-vs-networking split here is an estimate.
Node/packaging assignments (e.g. XPU on N3, next-gen on N2) are from press & industry reporting, not TSMC/Broadcom confirmation.
Live proxies (AVGO/NVDA/TSM equity) are sentiment context, deliberately kept out of the core pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: 部分客製 XPU 客戶身分（哪一家巨頭）來自媒體／產業歸因，非 Broadcom 確認。
AI 營收為管理層定義並指引；此處運算 vs 網路的拆分為估計。
節點／封裝對應（如 XPU 用 N3、次世代用 N2）來自媒體與產業報導，非台積電/Broadcom 確認。
即時 proxy（AVGO/NVDA/TSM 股價）為情緒情境，刻意排除在核心定價權分數之外。
